name: Urban Legend

abilities.name: Vicious Mockery
abilities.text: When this model targets an enemy with an Entranced token, it may remove the token from the enemy model. If it does so, the target receives a (fortitude) to resist the duel.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.text: When an enemy model ends its activation, one model with this ability and engaged with the enemy may drain a (soulstone) to declare a (melee) action targeting the enemy.

extraction_notes: The card shows abilities granted to 'Friendly Redchapel models'
Vicious Mockery provides a penalty (fortitude) to resist when removing Entranced tokens
Pounce allows reactive melee actions at the cost of draining a soulstone
